title: Fix draft.resumeTitle i18n key displaying at first position

requirements.text: Locate where 'draft.resumeTitle' i18n key is being displayed in the UI (likely in ResumeDraftDialog.tsx or SurveyWizard.tsx) and ensure it is wrapped with the translation function t() so it displays the translated value instead of the raw key string.

quotes: draft.resumeTitle -- see again this is coming at first

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'draft.resumeTitle' no longer appears as raw text in the UI
The translated value for 'draft.resumeTitle' displays correctly in both English and Hindi
The fix applies to all locations where this key is rendered

requirements.text: Verify that the 'draft.resumeTitle' translation key exists in both en.ts and hi.ts translation files with appropriate values; if missing, add it with a suitable translation (e.g., 'Resume Your Survey' in English).
acceptanceCriteria: Both translations provide appropriate localized text

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui files
Use the existing translation system via the t() function from LanguageContext
nonGoals: Changing the draft persistence logic or localStorage implementation
Modifying the ResumeDraftDialog functionality beyond the translation fix
